name: Google Workspace
description: Access Gmail, Google Docs, Sheets, Slides, and Google Drive in one integration. Read and send emails, create and edit documents, manage spreadsheets, and search your Drive files.

tools_summary.name: search_drive
tools_summary.description: Search across Google Drive files by name or content

tools_summary.name: read_file
tools_summary.description: Read the content of a Google Doc, Sheet, or Slide

tools_summary.name: create_document
tools_summary.description: Create a new Google Doc with specified content

tools_summary.name: list_files
tools_summary.description: List files in a Drive folder

tools_summary.name: get_file_metadata
tools_summary.description: Get detailed metadata about a specific Drive file

setup_instructions:
1. Go to Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials
2. Create an OAuth 2.0 Client ID (Desktop app type)
3. Enable Google Drive API, Gmail API, Docs API, and Sheets API
4. Run the OAuth flow once to get a refresh token
5. Set GDRIVE_CLIENT_ID, GDRIVE_CLIENT_SECRET, and GDRIVE_REFRESH_TOKEN
Note: Google Calendar and Drive are also available as native plugins with full OAuth support.
_note: This MCP covers Drive/Docs/Sheets. For Gmail, consider the separate gmail MCP server (@gptscript-ai/gmail-mcp). Google Calendar is handled by the native google_calendar_plugin.
